jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - 91Springboard - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
